svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="假功能排查的八种类型" id="fake-features"> <mxGraphModel dx="-509" dy="-157" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="/super-pm 守住的底线:这 8 类「看起来像但没用」的东西,发现就是阻断" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="660" x="160" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BLOCK" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="阻断级 · 不准过关" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="220" x="380" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="弹窗代替逻辑
点了只弹提示,没状态回流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="40" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="占位入口
按钮/菜单没绑真实逻辑" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="350" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="假数据冒充
列表/详情用硬编码数据" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="660" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="骨架页冒充
只有 loading 动画没内容" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="40" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="演示版本
以 MVP/占位/仅联调为口径" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="350" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="假价/不可达入口
优惠点不进去或价格对不上" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="660" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="硬编码配置
业务参数/色彩值写死在代码" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="190" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="假绿
全体 skip + 退出码 0 冒充通过" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="510" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EF1" edge="1" parent="1" source="F1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="BLOCK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EF2" edge="1" parent="1" source="F2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="BLOCK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EF3" edge="1" parent="1" source="F3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="BLOCK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EF4" edge="1" parent="1" source="F4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="BLOCK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EF5" edge="1" parent="1" source="F5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="BLOCK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EF6" edge="1" parent="1" source="F6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="BLOCK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EF7" edge="1" parent="1" source="F7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="BLOCK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EF8" edge="1" parent="1" source="F8" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="BLOCK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
